text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 06. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
